articles.title: $323 million in ETH stolen from cross-chain protocol Wormhole
articles.description: According to a series of etherscan transactions, an attacker has exploited Wormhole, a bridge between the Ethereum and Solana blockchains, for close to $323 million in ETH. Wormhole is a bridging protocol that enables assets to move across various blockchain protocols. When a user sends assets from one chain to another, the bridge locks the […] The post $323 million in ETH stolen from cross-chain protocol Wormhole appeared first on The Block.
